title: brandisia glabrescens
intro: Brandisia glabrescens, a plant species, is a type of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Brandisia glabrescens include its ability to alleviate fever, reduce swelling, and treat digestive issues. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and it is often used in traditional folk medicine in certain regions.
